STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DETONATE.description: Remove [gold]Vengeful Spirits[/gold] from the enemy, dealing their damage to that enemy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DETONATE.title: Detonate
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RELEASE.description:
Optionally remove X amount of [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold] and/or [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold] from the player when playing this card to activate this effect.
[gold]Guided Spirits[/gold] are prioritized first.
You must have the required amount before playing the card.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RELEASE.title: Release X
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISPLACE.description: Change the current [gold]Distance[/gold] of the target by X. Enemies with no distance have their distance treated as 3. Any instance of changing distance of a unit is [gold]Displacement[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISPLACE.title: Displace X
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CLONE.description: Cards created with the [gold]Clone[/gold] keyword cannot be [gold]Cloned[/gold]. Do not confuse with copy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CLONE.title: Clone
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-REPLENISH.descriptio: Whenever this card is drawn, draw 1 card.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-REPLENISH.title: Replenish
